titleStmt.title: SII 22.13: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 13. (A.R. No. 13 of 1906) SALEM DISTRICT, NAMAKKAL TALUK, NĀMAKKAL. MUNIYAPPAN TEMPLE—ON A ROCK CLOSE BY. TRIBH. KON. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYA-8th YEAR.

summary.p: This records an order of the king making a tax-free grant of the village Vānavamādēvi in Ēḻūr-nāḍu a sub-division of Vaḍakoṅgu to a surgical doctor, (aṅgavaidya) by name Savarṇaṉ Pārāśrayaṉ Ādittadēvaṉ Tiruvambalapperumāḷ of Nāṅgūr who had the title “Vaidya-purandara”. This order is given effect to and executed in another inscription (No. 13 A.), engraved below, by the Sabhā, the Nāṭṭār and Nagarattār of Ēḻūr-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Aṅga- vaidyaril nāṅkūr savaṉan pā—
rāḻrayaṉ Ātittatevaṉ tiruvampalap perumāḷāṉa vaidyapurantaraṟku va
ṭakoṅku Ēḻurnāṭṭu vāṉavaṉmātevi nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nañcai puṉceyum
nattamum nattappāṭum vāstuvum vāstuśeṣamum kuḷamum kuḷapparippum toṭṭamum to—
ṭṭakkūṟum Āṟṟaṅkālum turavum kāṭum malaiyum maṟṟu meppeṟpaṭṭa samasta prā
ptikaḷilum paḻantevatāṉan tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam paḷḷiccantam paṭṭarkaḷiṟaiyilini—
kkiyuḷḷa samasta prāptikaḷum Eṭṭāvatu puraṭṭāti mātamutal Udakapūrvvadharmmadāna Iṟaiyiliyā
kat tantom Ittāl varum kaṭamai ponvari kaṟpūra viṉiyokam māvaṭai puṉpayir taṟiiṟai cekkiṟai taṭ
ṭoli taṭṭārppāṭṭam Ervari Iṉavari Iṭaivari Erimiṉpāṭṭam kāṇikkai kāttikaippaccai nallerutu
naṟpacup pañcupili Olai Eḻuttu viṉiyokam vācalpeṟu Ilāñciṉaip peṟu veṭṭi Āḷ tevai taccutte—
vai Āṉaiccālai kutiraippanti maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum Iṉṉāḷmutal variyilār kaṇak—
kilum kaḻittu muṉṉuṭaiyāraiyum paḻamperaiyum mutalaṟat tavirttut tamakku mutalaṭaṅkalum
Iṟaiyili Ākavum dānādhamanavikrayaṅkaḷukkurittākavum tantom Ippaṭikku ccandrādittavat celvatākak
kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum pārkka Ivai Ilai nallūruṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiyappallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Aḷavu 10 6 .

svasti śrī . Eḻurnāṭṭu sabhaiyārum nāṭṭārum nakarattārum nāṅkūr savarṇṇan
pārāḻrayaṉ Ātittatevaṉ tiruvampalapperumāḷāṉa vaidyapurantararkku Eṅkaḷ
nāṭṭu vāṉavaṉmātevi nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa sakalaprāptikaḷum Eṭṭāvatu
puraṭṭāti mātamutal paṇṭuṭaiyyāraiyum paḻam peraiyum mutalaṟat tavirttu Ivvūr sakala—
prāptikaḷum tamakku Udakapūrvva dharmmadāṉamāka sarvvamānnyamum Iṟaiyili Ākap perumāḷ
cuntarapāṇṭiyatevar tantaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭiye nāṅkaḷum tamakku Utakam paṇṇi
Iṟaiyiliākat tantom Ippaṭikkup paṇiyāl nāṭṭukkaṇakkuc cūriya tevaṉ
Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
